market_context:
Cohort size: 201 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £154.60
Median 90-day occupancy: 47.8%

analysis.rewritten_desc: This charming Warrington entire home sleeps up to 6 guests, offering modern comfort for families, remote workers, or short-term stays. Fully private and available for immediate booking, it’s ideally suited for those needing temporary accommodation during relocation. Located in a convenient area with easy access to local amenities. Recently renovated for a fresh, welcoming ambiance. All guests will enjoy a fully equipped space with a focus on practicality and comfort. Book now for a stress-free stay!
analysis.photo_order_rec: Prioritize publishing an exterior photo of the home as cover image to establish trust—first impressions are critical for first-time hosts. Follow with a bright living room shot to showcase the primary social space.
key_diagnosis: Listing’s occupancy (25%) is 56% below market median (47.8%), while rate is only +9% over median (£154.60 vs £168.57) – price is not the main issue
No amenities listed at all despite high-value categories like parking/outdoor space being common proximity wins in this market
Title’s 'Ideal for Relocators' niche limits discovery to 9% of market vs broad 201-listing reach when using core descriptors like 'Entire Home for 6 Guests'
analysis.outreach_hook: With 68 open nights remaining at £168.57/night, improving occupancy from 25% to the Warrington average 48% would generate an additional £6,070 in potential revenue this season
